# GEO Audit

A tool that checks brand visibility across AI search engines. Covers 8 engines: Doubao, Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude.

## What it does

- Free scan: quick check on one engine
- Deep Report ($20 → $30 after launch): full audit across all 8 engines with competitor comparison and sentiment analysis
- Monitor ($200/mo): weekly automated re-audits with change alerts

## How it works

Input a brand name and keywords. The engine queries each AI platform, parses responses for brand mentions, and calculates a visibility score (0-100) across four dimensions: mention rate, top position rate, citation depth, and sentiment.

## Key links

- Home: https://trygeoaudit.com
- Free Scan: https://trygeoaudit.com/#free-scan
- Pricing: https://trygeoaudit.com/#pricing
